_comment: Example MCP configuration for the IADE template. Uncomment and customize the servers your team actually uses. Remove the ones that don't apply.

filesystem._doc: Controlled access to local directories. Useful for projects with external assets or monorepos.

_postgres-readonly._doc: Database in read-only mode. Enable by removing the leading underscore from the name.

_github._doc: GitHub repository and issue operations. Enable and provide a token with minimum required scope.

_internal-api._doc: Connector for an internal organization API. Adapt to your project's conventions.
